FIELDNOTES
BLOG
CREATIVE

Depression, distraction and the last push

Huh, here I am. After all these months of hustle, I think I finally hit the bottom rock of my mental health the last 10 days or so. This depressing mood is wow, just consuming. I never felt this sort of thing for such a long period of time. The issue mostly grows when you don’t have an emotional support to atleast temporarily move ahead.

I rely a lot on my own understanding of issues and it’s getting harder and harder now. I only need to push for couple weeks more that’s it. But ah. Something new entered into my list of problems. I have a knee pain that I am scared about. It’s not too much, but it is causing some instability and pain at certain angles. Haven’t been running since two months now. Ah, and on top of that I have been feeling weak. My diet, and sleep are all effected. It’s officialy screwed at many levels. But yet, I am trying to function a little. Mom and Dad went on a trip during the last week, and I did wakeup up a little early and even cooked a few meals for the three of us - me, sisso, and grandma.

I visited three physios last week. Anyway, I have my therapy session tomorrow. That should help me with something atleast.

Emotional support ahhhh.

Art $\times$ Science
